headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Alexandria Real Estate, Lowers Price Target to $55
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Steve Sakwa   maintains Alexandria Real Estate (NYSE:ARE) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $65 to $55.

headline: Baird Downgrades Alexandria Real Estate to Neutral, Lowers Price Target to $46
summary: Baird  analyst David Rodgers   downgrades Alexandria Real Estate (NYSE:ARE) from Outperform to Neutral and lowers the price target from $67 to $46.
